reason: Successfully verified that the agent can open a browser, navigate to https://example.com, retrieve the page title "Example Domain", and report it back in the chat interface.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 - Page loaded successfully showing Gamut interface with sidebar containing available agents
Found and clicked the "QA-20260721-175118-kz8h" agent in the sidebar - Agent page opened successfully with chat interface ready for input
Typed the message "Open a browser and go to https://example.com. Tell me the page title." in the chat input field - Message displayed in input field
Sent the message using Ctrl+Enter - Message was successfully sent and session was created with URL showing /sessions/f9922aca-2e41-4a33-bce6-77f627ca5172
Waited up to 3 minutes for agent response - Agent completed processing in approximately 13 seconds

Verified the response contains "Example Domain" - Response clearly displays "The page title is 'Example Domain'" and confirms "The page at https://example.com has the title 'Example Domain'. Browser closed." All tool calls (ToolSearch, Open Browser, Browser MCP: Browser Get State, Close Browser) completed successfully with green checkmarks
